name: measure_joints
description: Detect cylindrical joint "ports" (ball-sockets, hinges, pegs) on a mesh. For kit-bashing and mechanical assembly: returns each round joint's world-space center, axis, and radius, so you can mate parts. Pair with snap_fit to seat one part's port onto another's. Tunables: perp_thresh (perpendicular-normal strictness), axial_gap (min separation between two ports along an axis), radius_tol (how clean a ring must be). NOTE: ring detection is defeated by gear teeth / knurling / heavy surface detail — for those, stack parts on end-cap centroids instead (see the kitbash-axis-stacking skill / stack_parts tool). Read-only.

perp_thresh.description: Max |face_normal . axis| for a face to count as a cylinder side-face. Default 0.30.

axial_gap.description: Min gap (object units) along the axis separating two distinct ports. Default 6.0.

radius_tol.description: A ring is accepted only if its radius spread is within this fraction. Default 0.18.

author: modeler-agent
